channel.title: Puddings on Bell Favorite Recipes
channel.description: Recent content in Puddings on Bell Favorite Recipes

item.title: Blanc Mange
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1/3 cup sugar
  • 3 Tbsp cornstarch
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 2-1/4 cup milk

Instructions

Mix sugar, starch and salt in top of double boiler. Add milk, mix and cook until thickened.

Yum, Yum!

item.title: Bread Pudding
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 cups bread crumbs
  • ½ cup white sugar
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • 1 tsp cinnamon or nutmeg
  • ½ cup seeded raisins
  • 2 eggs
  • 2 cups milk
  • ¼ cup of butter

Instructions

Scald milk and add butter. Beat eggs slightly and add to milk with sugar, salt, spice and raisins. Pour over bread crumbs and mix well. Pour into a greased deep casserole and bake in a 350 degree oven for 45 minutes. Serve with cream or lemon sauce.

item.title: Caramel Dumplings
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 tbsp butter or margarine
  • 1-1/2 cups packed brown sugar
  • 1-1/2 cups water

Instructions

DUMPLINGS; 1-1/4 cups all-purpose flour ½ cup sugar 2 tsp baking powder ½ tsp salt ½ cup milk 2 tbsp butter or margarine, softened 2 tsp vanilla extract ½ cup coarsely chopped peeled apple (optional)

In a skillet, heat the unsoftened butter, brown sugar and water to boiling. Reduce heat to simmer. Meanwhile, mix together all dumpling ingredients. Drop by tablespoonfuls into the simmering sauce. Cover tightly and simmer 20 minutes. Do not lift lid. Serve warm with cream or ice cream, if desired.

item.title: Fruity Bread Pudding for Two
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 cup cubed bread
  • ½ cup chopped peeled apples
  • ¼ cup dried cranberries, cherries or apricots
  • 1 egg
  • ¼ cup white sugar
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • ½ cup milk
  • 1 tsp butter
  • Cinnamon

Instructions

In lightly greased 2-cup baking dish, toss together bread, apples and cranberries.

In small bowl, whisk together egg, sugar and vanilla. In small saucepan, heat milk with butter just until steaming; gradually whisk into egg mixture in slow, steady stream. Pour over bread mixture. Let stand for 5 minutes, press gently to loisten bread evenly. Sprinkle with cinnamon to taste.

item.title: Malva Pudding (claire Massicotte)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • CAKE: 1 cup sugar
  • 1 egg
  • 1 tbsp apricot jam
  • 1 cup flour
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • generous pinch of salt
  • 1 tbsp butter
  • 1 tsp vinegar
  • 1 cup milk
  • SAUCE 1 cup cream
  • 6 oz butter
  • 1 cup sugar
  • ½ cup hot water

Instructions

Beat the egg and sugar well in a mixer. Add the jam, sift flour, baking soda, baking powder and salt. Melt the butter and add the vinegar. Add liquids to egg mixture alternately with the flour. Beat well and bake in a covered dish at 350 degrees F. for 45 minute to 1 hour. It is important to use a covered dish otherwise sauce won’t sink into the cake.

item.title: Pudding-cake (kraft Winter 2006)
item.description:
Instructions

Prep. Time: 15 min. Total: 1 hour 35 Min.

1 pkg (2-layer size) yellow cake mix 2 cups cold milk 1-1/4 cup water 2 pkg (4-serving size each) Jell-o Lemon 1/3 cup sugar (optional) Instant Pudding 2 Tbsp icing sugar (optional)

Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Prepare cake mix as directed on package. Pour batter into greased 13 x 9-inch baking dish. Pour milk and water into large bowl. Add dry pudding mixes and granulated sugar, if using. Beat with wire whisk 2 minutes or until well blended. Pour over cake batter in dish. Place baking dish on baking sheet to catch dripping, as mixture does bubble. Bake 55 min. to 1 hour or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool in pan 20 minutes. (Mixture will thicken slightly as it cool.). Sprinkle with icing sugar, if using. Spoon onto serving dishes. Serve warm; garnish with raspberries, if desired. Makes 16 servings. Serving suggestions: There’s no need to reheat leftovers – this cake is also delicious as a cold treat. The lemon filling transforms from saucy and gooey to thick and custard-like. Yummy!

item.title: Quick Chocolate Mousse - Cw
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 14-oz Eagle Brand
  • 1 pkg (4-oz) instant chocolate pudding mix
  • 1 cup cold water
  • Additional whipped cream
  • 1 cup whipping cream, whipped

Instructions

In a large mixing bowl, combine milk, pudding mix and water. Beat until well mixed. Chill 5 minutes. Fold in whipped cream. Spoon into individual serving dishes and garnish with additional whipped cream.

Yield: 4 – 6 servings

item.title: Rhubarb Crisp
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 cups rhubarb
  • ½ cup white sugar
  • 1 tsp cinnamon

Instructions

Mix and place in bottom of buttered dish.

1 cup rolled oats ½ cup margarine ½ cup flour 1 cup brown sugar

Mix till crumbly and place on top of rhubarb.

Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

Yum, Yum delicious!

item.title: Rhubarb Dessert
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 egg, beaten
  • 1 cup flour
  • 1-1/2 cup white sugar
  • 3-1/2 tsp baking powder
  • 2 tbsp shortening
  • ½ tsp salt
  • ¼ cup milk

Instructions

Mix the above ingredients and put in 13 x 9 inch pan. Cover with 4 or 5 cups cut rhubarb. Sprinkle with 1 cup sugar and pour 2 cups boiling water over top. Bake at 350 to 400 degrees F. for 30 minutes (or until top is golden brown). Serve with whipped cream.

item.title: Rice Pudding, Mom’s Creamy – (hazelwood Cookbook)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1-1/2 cup cooked rice
  • 1 Tbsp butter
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 2 eggs
  • ½ cup raisins
  • 1/3 cup sugar

Instructions

Combine rice, milk, eggs and sugar in double boiler. Heat until mixture coats metal spoon. Add remaining ingredients and let sit for 30 minutes.
